goal: fix ao eval baseline A/B default run ID collision

tool_health.bd_probe: bd ready --json and bd list --type epic --status open --json succeeded

applied_knowledge.reason: Eval artifact semantics and baseline governance should stay distinct; the fix must preserve per-leg scorecard identity rather than only changing console output.

related_work.title: Add eval determinism rerun harness
related_work.relationship: Adjacent follow-up; do not fold the run-ID collision into this broader harness unless execution explicitly expands scope.

bug_scan_evidence.reproduction: cd cli && go run ./cmd/ao eval run ../evals/agentops-core/lid-primitives-demo.json --runtime shell --baseline-mode both --json | jq -r '[.skill_on_run_id, .skill_off_run_id, (.skill_on_run_id == .skill_off_run_id)] | @tsv'

ranked_context.why: RunBaselineAB only suffixes RunID when opts.RunID is non-empty; default RunSuite IDs collide inside the same second.
Existing tests cover explicit run IDs and output suffixing but not default RunBaselineAB execution.
Contract should state per-leg run IDs remain distinct even when --run-id is omitted.
Smallest executable fixture for CLI-level smoke proof.
